title: Founding Engineer
description: Developing an ERP end-to-end for agricultural businesses with Assam Agricultural University to bring AI-powered agriculture management to medium and large-scale agricultural business in rural India
Integrated LiteLLM for the AI-automation of CRM, domain modules, prediction of KPIs, forecast of output based on weather and natural events
Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with granular permission management for admin users managing client requests and monitoring user activities
Developing an integrated marketplace for Producers (Poultry, Cattle Rearing, Apiculture, Floriculture) to sell produce directly to registered Sellers within the platform

title: Software Developer
description: Core contributor to the development of ComPro, a centralized compliance monitoring platform featuring a user-friendly interface tailored for staffing providers across the DACH region.
Architected a standardized UI component library using Storybook, streamlining the development lifecycle for the Pactos product suite and ensuring 100% design-to-code consistency.
Engineered high-performance optimizations post-v1 launch, achieving a 99.8% reduction in API response times (from 12s to 20ms) and significantly decreasing Payload CMS load times.
Optimized operational overhead by designing a sophisticated caching and data-fetching strategy for the NorthData API, resulting in a measurable reduction in third-party integration costs.
Ensured platform reliability by resolving mission-critical production bottlenecks and managing seamless deployments across multi-tier (Test, Staging, Production) environments under tight deadlines

title: Frontend Developer
description: Spearheaded the core frontend development of Golfpost Fantasy, a social sports-engagement platform for golf enthuasist to participate in predictive gaming and earn choice-based rewards
Architected and maintained a foundational UI component library, prioritizing modular reusability, mobile responsiveness, and a consistent code paradigm to accelerate the development lifecycle
Directed the UI/UX strategy and rapid prototyping for the mobile-native version of Golfpost Fantasy; collaborated across teams to implement impactful layout designs, increasing engagement by 60%
Fostered a learning culture by organizing and facilitating internal technical workshops. Conducted code reviews and created comprehensive documentation to standardize best practices across the team

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Engineered an internal AI-driven consultancy management platform for consultants, designed to analyze client performance metrics and identify key drivers for KPI optimization.

Architected and optimized secure, high-performance RESTful API endpoints, achieving a 60% increase in load handling capacity and significantly reducing latency through advanced caching and database tuning.
Strengthened platform stability by resolving critical software defects and implementing a rigorous code review process, which accelerated deployment cycles and reduced long-term maintenance costs.
Integrated Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities to automate data processing, add agentic capabilities and provide predictive analytics for identifying customer trends.
Managed and extended legacy WordPress infrastructure, developing custom plugins and bespoke content management solutions to ensure continuous operational uptime.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Worked on the frontend of MindCleanse, a cross-platform mobile application focused on mental health coaching with Vue.js, Ionic, Tailwind, Typescript and Pinia
Collaborated with agile team in sprint meetings to conceptualize user stories, and develop features and functionalities based on customer requirements
Practiced pair programming to rapidly develop a client website called OneHandBall
Developed a video chat module for MindCleanse; also compatible with other company applications as a library

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Developed and deployed responsive, SEO-optimized web applications for small and medium-sized businesses
Successfully developed and deployed the official website for our university’s annual festival KIITFEST 2019
Developed a marketplace with responsive design for a local flower store to immensely boost sales revenue
Supported end-users by designing Figma prototypes, analysing feedbacks, fixing production issues and adding new features
Created and maintained technical documentation and user manuals for junior developers and end-users respectively
